title: Soft Neutral Woven Hamper in 3 Color Shades Beige, Taupe & Brown | Cotton Rope Extra Large Blanket Basket | Laundry Hamper for Store Blanket, Clothes and Stuff Toys
features: JUMBO CAPACITY & MULTIFUNCTIONAL HOME ORGANIZATION: Our generously sized 60-Liter 30cm Height x 50cm Dia cotton rope storage basket is the ultimate solution for home. Designed to effortlessly contain a load of dirty clothes, bulky items like throws, blankets, and pillows, or a massive collection of children's toys and sundries. It seamlessly transitions between a large laundry hamper for the utility room, a chic toy basket for the kids' room, stylish blanket storage for the living room, or even a cozy, spacious pet bed/cradle for cats and small dogs.

PREMIUM, ECO-FRIENDLY WOVEN COTTON: Hand-woven from 100% natural, chemical-free cotton rope, this soft yet incredibly durable basket is built with safety as the priority. Unlike rigid plastic or wicker hampers, it contains no sharp corners, hard edges, or irritating chemicals, making it completely safe for use around newborns, toddlers, children, and beloved pets. The soft texture ensures no scratches on your delicate hardwood floors, walls, or furniture, allowing it to be dragged or slid without worry.

DURABILITY WITH STURDY HANDLES: Constructed for maximum strength, this collapsible storage bin features a robust design with reinforced handles. The soft cotton weave is tough enough to handle heavy loads; handles allow for comfortable and easy transport. You can confidently lift, carry, or drag the full basket up and down stairs to the laundry room, making wash day simpler.

ELEGANT NEUTRAL DESIGN: Featuring a contemporary three-tone color block design in neutral beige, taupe, and brown, this basket is more than a storage bin. It’s a decorative accent. Its stylish aesthetic and round, flowing shape help to create a warmer, more harmonious room atmosphere, blending effortlessly with virtually any home decor style, from bohemian and rustic to modern and minimalist.

EASY TO RESTORE & FULLY MACHINE WASHABLE: This basket is shipped folded to save on transport costs and space; simply follow our easy instructions to regain its perfect shape. The creases will disappear quickly by either lightly ironing the fabric or by simply filling it tightly with blankets, quilts, or towels overnight. For long-term hygiene, the all-cotton construction makes it fully collapsible and washable. For a quick refresh, spot clean; for a deep clean, it can be safely hand washed or machine washed (we recommend placing it in a large laundry bag/mesh cover for machine washing) to ensure your storage solution remains clean and fresh season after season.
description: ECO-FRIENDLY WOVEN COTTON LAUNDRY STORAGE BASKET Experience the perfect blend of style, functionality, and safety with our Jumbo 60-Liter Woven Cotton Storage Basket—an elegant all-purpose organizer designed for modern homes. Crafted from soft, natural cotton rope, this neutral beige/brown basket enhances any space while providing generous storage for toys, blankets, clothes, pillows, and everyday essentials. Unlike rigid plastic or rough wicker hampers, its soft, chemical-free construction is gentle on skin and surfaces, making it ideal for nurseries, kids’ rooms, bedrooms, and living areas. The sturdy, reinforced handles allow easy lifting and transport, while the collapsible design ensures convenient storage when not in use. Whether you need a stylish toy bin, a cozy pet bed, a large laundry hamper, or a decorative living room organizer, this woven basket adapts effortlessly to every room and lifestyle. Designed with durability, beauty, and practicality in mind, it delivers long-lasting performance while adding warmth and charm to your home décor. Specifications Capacity: 60 Liters Dimensions: 30 cm Height x 50 cm Diameter Color: Neutral Beige, Taupe, and Brown Three-Tone Material: 100% Natural Cotton Rope Safety: Chemical-free, soft, child- and pet-safe Handles: Reinforced handles for lifting and carrying Structure: Soft yet sturdy woven cotton construction Weight: Lightweight and easy to move Cleaning: Machine washable and hand washable Storage: Collapsible design for compact storage Features Large 60L capacity perfect for toys, blankets, clothes, or pillows Hand-woven from premium, eco-friendly 100% cotton rope Soft, safe construction with no sharp edges for babies and pets Reinforced handles allow easy lifting, dragging, and transport Neutral beige and brown tones complement all home décor styles Durable weave maintains shape even with heavy loads Shipped folded and easy to reshape using simple home methods Fully machine washable for long-term hygiene and freshness Lightweight and collapsible for convenient storage and portability Stylish round design enhances bedrooms, nurseries, and living rooms
